name: pdf-fusion-smart-pro
description: Browser-first PDF toolkit with Verify System v14 Enterprise Trust Suite: asymmetric signing/key rotation, Redis/GitHub storage adapters, Trust Portal, Document Information, analytics, bulk actions, E2E checks and admin console.

scripts.check:js: npm run check:api && npm run check:assets && npm run check:portal
scripts.verify:health:local: node -e "const h=require('./api/verify.js'); const req={method:'GET',url:'/api/verify?action=health',headers:{},socket:{}}; const res={setHeader(){},end(x){console.log(x)},set statusCode(v){this._s=v},get statusCode(){return this._s}}; h(req,res)"
scripts.check:portal: node --check assets/pfsp-trust-portal.js && node --check assets/pfsp-trust-certificate.js && node --check assets/pfsp-verify-asset-guard.js
scripts.test: npm run check:js && npm run predeploy-check && npm run verify:e2e
